Home»Lifestyle»Celeb News»International Celebs»The prettiest Olympic athletes of 2024

A list of 2024’s prettiest Olympic athletes, from Germany’s Alica Schmidt, America’s Alexis Holmes to Netherlands’ Lieke Kleava.

We compiled a list of the prettiest athletes at the 2024 Paris Olympics from Alexis Holmes, Lieke Klaver, Alica Schmidt to Simone Biles and many more.

So, without further ado, let’s dive into the glittering world of the most attractive athletes in no particular order.

Lieke Klaver: Netherlands

The beautiful Lieke Klaver is a Dutch athlete, who is renowned for her prowess in track events. She competes in sprinting and excels in the 200m and 400m events.

The Adidas athlete became popular on social media after her Tokyo Olympics debut and currently has nearly one million followers on Instagram.

A post shared by Lieke Klaver | Olympian (@liekeklaver)

Alica Schmidt: Germany

German sprinter, Alica Schmidt is a trending topic on social media for her model-like looks and toned physique.

According to theNew York Post, the 25-year-old has been dubbed “the world’s sexiest athlete” by her fans. She’s also a sports influencer thanks to her Boss and Tiffany & Co ambassadorship positions.

Schmidt currently boasts over seven million followers between her Instagram and TikTok account.

A post shared by Alica Ѕchmidt | Track & Field (@alicasmd)

Alexis Holmes:  United States of Ameria

Alexis Holmes is a 24-year-old American track and field athlete who competes over 400 metres. Holmes became popular at theParisOlympics when she ran the final leg for the U.S women’s 4×400 relay team, with her team finishing in a national record of 3:15.27.

A post shared by Alexis Holmes (@trackqueenlex)

Rhasidat Adeleke: Ireland

21-year-old Rhasidat Adeleke is the fastest woman from Ireland, according toOlympics. She was the first Irish woman to break the 50-second barrier in the 400 metres and was recently listed on the prettiest athlete list by her fans onsocial media.

A post shared by Rhasidat Adeleke (@rhasidat_adeleke)

Simone Biles:United States of America

27-year-old Simone Biles is regarded as one of the greatest gymnasts of all time with an astonishing tally of 37 World and Olympic medals, according toLofficielUSA.

Biles, who currently has over 12 million followers on Instagram is a vocal mental health awareness advocate and regarded as one of the most beautiful women Olympians.

A post shared by Simone Biles (@simonebiles)

Sophie Becker: Ireland

Sophie Becker is a sprint athlete from Ireland who born on 16 May 1997 in Wexford.

The Irish athlete who specialises in the 400m sprint and the 4x400m relay currently has over 100k followers on Instagram.

A post shared by Sophie Becker (@sophiebecker10)



Who was your favourite athlete on the list?
